name: Cohasset Community Center
description: Cohasset Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Cohasset, MN. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Grand Rapids YMCA
description: Grand Rapids YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Grand Rapids, MN. There are 13 courts. 10 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.
open_play_schedule: Please contact Melissa Versich to sign up!

name: Grussendorf Park
description: Grussendorf Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Grand Rapids, MN. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Portage Park
description: Come play pickleball at Portage Park in Cohasset, MN! There are 7 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.
